title: Track true session PnL from actual session start, not last restart

context.problem_statement: Tonight's approved audit found that session PnL is under-counted because session_start_ts tracks the last restart, not the actual beginning of the trading session.
context.manager_intent: Implement the smallest safe fix so session PnL aligns with the intended trading session start rather than restart timing.

objective: Make session PnL reflect the actual trading session start instead of simply the most recent restart timestamp.
conditional_allowed_files: C:\Users\johnny\Desktop\sports_bot_v2\runtime\state.json path only through existing code if strictly required
forbidden_actions: Read every file in the repo
required_work: Inspect how session_start_ts is currently set and how session_pnl is computed
Implement the smallest safe change so session PnL tracks the intended trading session start rather than the last restart
Keep the patch local and minimal
acceptance_criteria: Session PnL no longer simply resets to the last restart timestamp
No files outside allowed scope are modified
python -m py_compile bot_core.py passes if changed
python -m py_compile dashboard_server.py passes if changed
verification_required: Explain old behavior vs new behavior
State how actual session start is determined after the patch
Run py_compile on each changed Python file
State whether restart is required for the fix to take effect
